commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5b9b52366c0ca0a4b386b2df170c0ff31b602fc7)
commands.review_summary:
Adds prompt-time `AgentSession` model synchronization from session-store entries, passes optional `storePath`/`sessionKey` through session creation including embedded attempts, and adds model-sync tests.

PR surface: Source +102, Tests +508. Total +610 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main can persist a different provider/model selection while `AgentSession.agent.state.model` remains the previous snapshot, and current post-turn consumers still read that snapshot.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action needs maintainer review of the model-switch ownership boundary plus contributor-supplied real behavior proof, so it is not a safe autonomous repair lane while the proof gate is missing.

target.title: fix(agents): sync stale this.model snapshot after /model switch
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #92415 — AgentSession.this.model goes stale when /model switch writes to session store but the in-memory session never re-reads it.

## Root Cause

^GpplyModelOverrideToSessionEntry() in model-overrides.ts writes a providerOverride/modelOverride + liveModelSwitchPending to the session store. The deferred switch mechanism (shouldSwitchToLiveModel()) re-reads the store and throws LiveSessionModelSwitchError on the next prompt, which triggers a run restart with a fresh AgentSession. That restart path was already safe.

**But** between the /model command and the restart, the long-lived AgentSession (TUI interactive, plugin SDK) uses the stale 	his.model for identity operations — provider lookup, model config, registry keys — producing wrong behavior.

The embedded runner was **not affected**: it creates a fresh AgentSession per run with params.model derived from the session entry at ^Gttempt.ts:2358.

## Fix

Add syncModelFromStoreEntry() called at the start of prompt() before model validation. Guard chain:

1. Skip if storePath is undefined (services path, no session store)
2. Skip if liveModelSwitchPending is not true
3. Skip if providerOverride or modelOverride is missing in store
4. Skip if model already matches (prevents duplicate \^GppendModelChange\)
5. Look up model in registry — skip if not found
6. Check auth is configured for target provider/model — skip if not
7. Direct assignment to \	his.model\ (not \setModel()\ — avoids duplicate transcript entries and settings writes)
8. Call \^GppendModelChange()\ and \setThinkingLevel()\

## Files Changed

- \src/agents/sessions/agent-session.ts\ — Add \storePath\/\sessionKey\ constructor params, \syncModelFromStoreEntry()\ method, call site in \prompt()\
- \src/agents/sessions/sdk.ts\ — Plumb \storePath\/\sessionKey\ through \CreateAgentSessionOptions\
- \src/agents/sessions/agent-session-services.ts\ — Same pass-through for services path
- \src/agents/sessions/agent-session.model-sync.test.ts\ — 8-test suite

## Verification

- [x] 8 new tests pass
- [x] 23 existing \live-model-switch.test.ts\ tests pass
- [x] 204 \sessions-patch.test.ts\ tests pass
- [x] TS clean
- [x] All 10 callers of \^GpplyModelOverrideToSessionEntry()\ verified safe

Closes #92415
target.author: samson910022
